response.overview: This feature film was filmed only within 3 hours and edited in a week for Joel Haver's "Shoot a Movie During The Oscars Challenge." Batman and his (so called) pal, Commissioner James Gordan, interrogate the Joker for his craziest crime yet… peeing on a bus. But what starts as an absurd accusation soon escalates into a conspiracy more twisted than they could have ever predicted.
response.title: A Batman Movie
